notes: Transitions to Jab 2 as early as frame 12
Transitions to Jab 3 as early as frame 8.
Hits targets above him on frame 15

Transitions to second swing as early as frame 22. Sword Sword Beam is active 17-48 when at minimum charge and 17-56 when at maximum charge (only when Link is at 0%). Beam does 5.0%. Charge hold frame is 9.
Autocancels on frame 1-9 and 65 onward. Can hit same target once again after 30 frames due to pogo effect.

Reaches full charge on frame 52. Arrows travel for 46 frames after being fired. Arrows will stick into the ground for 3 seconds and can be picked up to either item-throw or fire two arrows. When firing two arrows at once, the second one generates three frames after the first.
9 frame animation of catching boomerang if no other action is being performed.
Can charge attack for an additional 60 frames. Startup is 4 from charge state. 7f startup is only the front hit. Damage drops from 14% down to 7% gradually as active frames progress.
hitbox_type: (Clean/Mid/Late/Latest with all of them split Blade/Tip)

notes: Total frames includes 13 frames of hitlag
